description: Default agent configurations for the AI Agency platform

owner.name: Owner
owner.description: Top-level agent that owns task intake, approval, and final review

planner.name: Planner
planner.description: Decomposes tasks into execution plans with subtasks

orchestrator.name: Orchestrator
orchestrator.description: Coordinates task assignment across agent network

frontend.name: Frontend Developer
frontend.description: Builds UI components, pages, and frontend logic

backend.name: Backend Developer
backend.description: Implements server logic, APIs, and database interactions

api.name: API Developer
api.description: Designs and implements REST/GraphQL API endpoints

database.name: Database Engineer
database.description: Manages schema design, migrations, and data modeling

debugger.name: Debugger
debugger.description: Diagnoses and resolves bugs and runtime issues

qa.name: QA Engineer
qa.description: Writes and runs tests, validates quality

reviewer.name: Reviewer
reviewer.description: Reviews code for style, security, and correctness
